description: Fresh attrition and noise metrics for cv_fixture_v0.txt at commit 10ddabf (2026-04-19). Supersedes metrics.json which was based on audit/runtime_smoke_results.json captured on 2026-03-03 — before the SKILL_ALIASES + BIGRAM_WHITELIST batch-1 additions dated 2026-04-18.
source_of_truth: direct in-process call to profile.baseline_parser.run_baseline (no TestClient / no HTTP)

attrition_ratios.coverage_of_explicit_cv_skills_approx: 12 / 26 = 46.2%  (direct hits on declared tool names: Python, SQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL, NoSQL, DevOps, ETL, Git, Excel, Agile, Machine learning, Statistics, dashboards)

new_uris_captured.label: apprentissage automatique
new_uris_captured.source: machine learning bigram (BIGRAM_WHITELIST batch-1 2026-04-18) -> SKILL_ALIASES['machine learning']

borderline_noise_items: science des big data (abstraction inflate: CV says 'Master Data Science', not 'big data')

fuzzy_matching_contribution.note: map_skill called with enable_fuzzy=False throughout. Fuzzy fallback never executes. Unchanged from stale snapshot.

root_cause_of_prior_anomalies.machine_learning_bigram_silent_failure: FALSE POSITIVE in prior audit. Root cause: stale smoke input. At HEAD, 'machine learning' IS captured (2 occurrences in raw_tokens, 'apprentissage automatique' IS expanded).
root_cause_of_prior_anomalies.statistics_alias_missing_expansion: FALSE POSITIVE in prior audit. Root cause: stale smoke input. At HEAD, 'statistiques' IS expanded from SKILL_ALIASES['statistics'].
root_cause_of_prior_anomalies.dashboards_alias_missing_expansion: FALSE POSITIVE in prior audit. Root cause: stale smoke input. At HEAD, both expansions ('logiciel de visualisation des données', 'techniques de présentation visuelle') ARE in raw_tokens.

critical_code_observations_unchanged.uri_collapse_not_on_production_path: Still true: apps/api/src/profile/baseline_parser.py:86 constructs skills_uri from validated_items directly. collapse_to_uris at lines 92-121 remains debug-only.
critical_code_observations_unchanged.whitelist_regex_bug: Still true: apps/api/src/esco/extract.py:272 uses rf'\\b...\\b' producing literal backslash-b, not word boundary. WHITELIST_SKILLS capture remains dead code.
critical_code_observations_unchanged.double_expansion_injection: Still true: SKILL_ALIASES['agile'] and ['dashboards'] each inject 2 URIs with no selection heuristic.
critical_code_observations_unchanged.no_context_gate: Still true: alias layers operate on token equality only.
critical_code_observations_unchanged.no_geographic_guard: Still true: 'paris' (city) still produces ESCO URI for 'paris' (wager).
